title: ceratophyllum muricatum
intro: Ceratophyllum muricatum, also known as hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Ceratophyllaceae. Traditionally, hornwort has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of hornwort include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Hornwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health issues.
